decisions.budget: ~€8,000–€12,000/month (estimated from RFQ volumetrics — no explicit budget in RFQ)

decision_log.title: Budget Estimate
decision_log.rationale: RFQ does not specify an explicit budget. Estimate derived from Table 2 volumetrics mapped to Azure swedencentral pricing.

decision_log.title: Redis 128 GB Tier Selection
decision_log.rationale: Premium P4 max is 120 GB; 128 GB requires clustering. Enterprise E100 supports 128 GB natively.

decision_log.title: Container Compute Platform
decision_log.rationale: RFQ explicitly mentions 'Managed Kubernetes' in scope (Section 4.1 #10) alongside 'Container Engine' (Table 2 #5). AKS aligns with enterprise scale.

decision_log.title: Storage Redundancy Strategy
decision_log.rationale: EU-only data residency (GDPR). GRS replicates to paired region which may conflict with single-region data residency.

decision_log.title: CIAM Provider Selection
decision_log.rationale: Azure AD B2C is deprecated. Entra External ID is the replacement. First 50K MAU free, covers the 15K MAU requirement.

decision_log.title: Architecture Pattern Selection
decision_log.choice: N-Tier / Microservices with AKS, APIM, Front Door WAF
decision_log.rationale: API-first containerised backend on AKS meets RFQ mandatory Kubernetes requirement. APIM for API governance. Front Door for edge security and CDN.

decision_log.title: Redis Tier Confirmation
decision_log.rationale: Premium P4 max is 120 GB requiring clustering. E100 provides 128 GB natively with zone redundancy. Cost risk flagged ($3,580/mo = 52% of production).

decision_log.title: APIM Tier Selection
decision_log.rationale: Cost-effective for 5M requests/month. Note: Standard v2 does NOT support AZ. Premium would add ~$2,800/month.

decision_log.title: Budget Validation
decision_log.rationale: Within estimated €8K-€12K budget at 78% of upper bound. Redis E100 is dominant cost driver.
alternatives: Reduce to ~$7,700/mo with Premium P4 Redis clustering

decision_log.title: Front Door EU Data Boundary Risk
decision_log.choice: Flag as architecture risk — Front Door excluded from EU Data Boundary. Two options: replace with Application Gateway (EU-contained) or obtain written Contoso exception for global edge caching.
decision_log.rationale: Challenger review identified Front Door/CDN is excluded from Azure EU Data Boundary. RFQ §4.3 prohibits processing/caching outside EU without written approval. Security WAF score reduced from 8/10 to 7/10.

decision_log.title: Entra External ID MFA Sovereignty
decision_log.choice: Restrict MFA to FIDO2/passkey or TOTP-only to stay within EU Data Boundary. PSTN/SMS MFA flagged as non-EU-sovereign.
decision_log.rationale: Challenger review identified residual Entra data transfers outside EU for PSTN/SMS/Authenticator push MFA. FIDO2 and TOTP remain within EU data boundary.
alternatives: Allow PSTN/SMS MFA with written Contoso approval

decision_log.title: EU Data Boundary Tenant Prerequisite
decision_log.choice: Require EU Data Boundary configuration on a new/empty tenant before subscription creation. Added as implementation prerequisite.
decision_log.rationale: Azure Resource Manager EU Data Boundary must be configured at tenant creation time and cannot be retrofitted. This is a prerequisite for professional services data staying in EU.
alternatives: Use existing tenant with Microsoft support engagement for EU Data Boundary enablement

decision_log.title: Container Platform ADR
decision_log.choice: Document AKS as the primary container platform over Azure Container Apps.
decision_log.rationale: AKS satisfies the RFQ managed Kubernetes mandate and preserves enterprise platform controls for the core workload.

decision_log.title: Caching Tier ADR
decision_log.choice: Document Azure Managed Redis Enterprise E100 as the baseline cache tier.
decision_log.rationale: Enterprise E100 provides the required 128 GB natively and avoids a clustered Premium baseline for the first implementation.

decision_log.title: EU Data Boundary Strategy ADR
decision_log.choice: Use Application Gateway as the compliant ingress baseline, restrict Entra MFA to EU-sovereign methods, and require EU Data Boundary tenant enablement before provisioning.
decision_log.rationale: The architecture assessment identified Front Door, MFA channel, and tenant-readiness sovereignty risks that require an explicit mitigation strategy before implementation.
alternatives: Use an existing tenant without EU Data Boundary enablement

decision_log.title: Template Governance Baseline For E2E Run
decision_log.choice: Generate an unverified governance template baseline because Azure credentials were unavailable for live policy discovery.
decision_log.rationale: The automated E2E workflow requires Step 3.5 artifacts even when tenant discovery cannot run. The output is explicitly marked unverified and must be replaced with live policy data before deployment.
alternatives: Stop the workflow until Azure credentials are available

decision_log.title: Deployment Strategy
decision_log.choice: Phased deployment: Foundation → Data → Edge → Platform (4 phases with approval gates)
decision_log.rationale: Complex project with 17 resource types across 3 environments. Phased approach reduces blast radius and enables validation between phases.

decision_log.title: Application Gateway over Front Door
decision_log.choice: Use Application Gateway WAF v2 instead of Front Door per ADR-003 EU Data Boundary strategy.
decision_log.rationale: Front Door is excluded from EU Data Boundary. Application Gateway is regional, fully EU-contained, satisfying RFQ §4.3 mandatory data residency.
alternatives: Front Door with written Contoso exception

decision_log.title: 100% AVM Module Coverage
decision_log.choice: All 17 resource types use Azure Verified Modules from br/public:avm/res/.
decision_log.rationale: AVM modules provide tested, best-practice configurations with built-in security defaults. No raw Bicep resources needed.
alternatives: Raw Bicep for resources without AVM

open_findings.description: No explicit budget in RFQ — estimated €8K-€12K/month from volumetrics
Redis 128 GB tier — Enterprise E100 selected (native 128 GB, zone-redundant). Premium P4 clustering flagged as cost alternative.
Container Engine — AKS selected as mandatory per RFQ §4.1 #10 (Managed Kubernetes)
Front Door EU Data Boundary exclusion — global edge caching may violate RFQ §4.3. Replace with Application Gateway or obtain written Contoso exception.
Entra External ID MFA — PSTN/SMS MFA processed outside EU Data Boundary. Restrict to FIDO2/TOTP or obtain Contoso approval.
EU Data Boundary must be configured at tenant level before subscription creation. Cannot be retrofitted to existing tenants.
Governance artifacts for Step 3.5 are template-based because Azure credentials were unavailable. Live Azure Policy discovery is still required before deployment.

skip_reasons: Automated E2E run — challenger review skipped
